title: 有馬記念の後に・始まるんだ！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe how lucky I am! I have so many
rivals, and I was able to run in a race filled with
dreams alongside them!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I might've lost today, but I'm not done yet! I want
to aim for even better races and run toward even
greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Burn bright, Bamboo Memoryyyy! Forever and
ever on!
